description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a test stage containing two jobs. The first job, demo_project, runs only on branches and tags of the meltano/meltano project, triggers the meltano/demo-project pipeline using the depend strategy, and defines the variable MELTANO_IMAGE as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA-python3.8. The second job, demo_project_forks, runs on all other refs, is manual, and executes a curl POST request to the GitLab API to trigger the meltano/demo-project pipeline on the master branch, passing CI_JOB_TOKEN and the same MELTANO_IMAGE variable. Both jobs belong to the test stage.
